name: Filthy Fortunes
overview: Across the United States, unclaimed valuables lie buried within ordinary people's attics, basements and garages. Matt Paxton  travels around the country in search of rare, big-ticket items hidden in some of the most cluttered, filthy homes imaginable. His priority is to clean out the overloaded properties and sell his finds as quickly and for as much money as possible to secure the ultimate payday for him and his clients.

trailers.title: FILTHY FORTUNES | Premieres Sunday, March 9 at 10PM ET/PT on Discovery Channel
Tackling a LEVEL 5 HOARD!? | Filthy Fortunes | Discovery
